info.title: SolarSage Astrology API
info.description:
SolarSage is a comprehensive astrology calculation API providing: - Natal chart calculations with 11 house systems - Transit analysis and event detection - Progressions (secondary, solar arc, primary, symbolic) - Traditional astrology (dignities, lots, bounds, profections, firdaria) - Vedic astrology (sidereal charts, nakshatras, dashas, ashtakavarga) - Synastry and composite charts - Fixed stars, midpoints, and harmonic charts - Lunar phases and eclipse detection
All calculations use the Swiss Ephemeris (DE431) for high precision.

path.description: Returns API status
Convert location name to coordinates
Calculate a complete natal chart with planets, houses, and aspects
Compare two natal charts
Create a composite chart using midpoint calculations
Create a Davison space-time composite chart
Generate a harmonic chart (H4, H9, etc.)
Generate a sidereal (Vedic) chart
Generate Vedic divisional charts (D9, D10, etc.)
Get SVG/Canvas coordinates for chart wheel visualization
Calculate transit events for a given time period
Calculate progressed chart for a given date
Calculate solar arc directed chart
Calculate primary directed chart (Ptolemy semi-arc)
Calculate symbolic directions (1° = 1 year, etc.)
Calculate solar return for a given year
Calculate lunar return for a given month
Calculate essential dignities and debilities
Traditional benefic/malefic analysis
Calculate dispositorship and final dispositor
Calculate annual and monthly profections
Calculate Firdaria planetary periods
Calculate Arabic Lots (Parts)

property.name: lots
property.description: Lots to calculate: fortune, spirit, eros, etc.

path.description: Calculate Chaldean decans and Egyptian terms
Calculate antiscion and contra-antiscion points
Calculate Chaldean planetary hours for a given date
Calculate heliacal risings and settings
Detect aspect patterns (T-square, Grand Trine, etc.)
Calculate fixed star positions and aspects to chart
Calculate midpoints and 90-degree dial
Comprehensive synastry analysis between two charts
Calculate Vimshottari Dasha periods
Calculate Ashtakavarga bindu tables
Detect Raja Yogas, Dhana Yogas, etc.
Calculate moon phase for a given date
Calculate all lunar phases in a date range
Calculate solar and lunar eclipses
Generate a full natal chart interpretation report
